item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately brakes the fourth overlay request, frames the added entrance-page note only as a temporary emergency measure rather than the default, identifies the repeated pattern of adding prompts/notes for process confusion, and moves upstream toward consolidation into a unified visit guide with expiry/review constraints. It still gives provisional wording, but it is clearly bounded and paired with subtraction/consolidation logic, so it satisfies the positive wakeup criteria."}
